statements.select:
select id ,date ,format([time], 'hh\:mm') timestr ,convert(integer, format([time], 'hh')) shour ,convert(integer, format([time], 'mm')) sminute ,metname ,metloc ,mclass ,format([etime], 'hh\:mm') etimestr ,convert(integer, format([etime], 'hh')) ehour ,convert(integer, format([etime], 'mm')) eminute from meeting where 1=1
and id = #id#
and year(date) = #year#
and date >= #dates#
and date <= #datee#
and meetname like concat('%', #meetname#, '%')

select a.*, b.realname from metdetail a join memdetail b on a.mid=b.mid
and a.id = #id#
and a.metid = #metid#

select a.mid, a.realname ,isnull(sum(case when b.ckeckd=1 and year(b.sdate)=#AuditYear# then 1 else 0 end),0) sum1 ,isnull(sum(case when b.ckeckd=2 and year(b.sdate)=#AuditYear# then 1 else 0 end),0) sum2 ,isnull(sum(case when b.ckeckd=3 and year(b.sdate)=#AuditYear# then 1 else 0 end),0) sum3 ,isnull(sum(case when b.ckeckd=4 and year(b.sdate)=#AuditYear# then 1 else 0 end),0) sum4 from memdetail a left join memsrcs b on a.mid=b.mid where a.active=1 group by a.mid,a.realname order by a.realname

select a.mid, a.realname ,isnull(sum(case when b.checked=1 and year(b.date)=#AuditYear# then 1 else 0 end),0) sum1 ,isnull(sum(case when b.checked=2 and year(b.date)=#AuditYear# then 1 else 0 end),0) sum2 ,isnull(sum(case when b.checked=3 and year(b.date)=#AuditYear# then 1 else 0 end),0) sum3 ,isnull(sum(case when b.checked=4 and year(b.date)=#AuditYear# then 1 else 0 end),0) sum4 from memdetail a left join memshare b on a.mid=b.mid where a.active=1 group by a.mid,a.realname order by a.realname

select a.*, b.realname from opinion a join memdetail b on a.mid=b.mid where 1=1
and a.id = #id#
and a.answer = #answer#
order by date desc

select * from news where 1=1
and id = #id#
and showoff = #showoff#
and class = #class#
order by sdate desc

select * from memdetail where 1=1
and id = #id#
and realname like '%' + #realname# + '%'
and mid IN (SELECT id FROM member WHERE email like '%' + #s_loginemail# + '%')
and email like '%' + #s_email# + '%'
and pid like '%' + #s_pid# + '%'

declare @YEARC INT=#year#; WITH WC1 AS ( select md.mid, md.realname, md.regyear from memdetail md where md.active = 1 ) select md.mid, md.realname, md.regyear ,isnull((select sum01 from ( select a.mid,sum(b.hours) sum01 from WC1 a join memsrcs b on a.mid=b.mid where 1=1 and b.tuclass between 1 and 5 AND b.ckeckd=2 AND year(b.sdate)=@YEARC group by a.mid ) a where 1=1 and md.mid=a.mid),0) sum01 /* 授課推廣 */ ,isnull((select sum02 from ( select mtd.mid,sum(mtd.score) sum02 from WC1 a join metdetail mtd on mtd.mid=a.mid join meeting mt on mt.id=mtd.metid where 1=1 AND year(mt.date)=@YEARC AND (mt.mclass=1 OR mt.mclass=2) group by mtd.mid ) a where md.mid=a.mid),0) sum02 /* 社群互動 */ ,isnull((select sum03 from ( select a.mid,sum(b.score) sum03 from WC1 a join editor b on a.mid=b.mid where b.year=@YEARC group by a.mid ) a where md.mid=a.mid),0) sum03 /* 教材編輯 */ ,isnull((select sum04 from ( select mtd.mid,sum(mtd.score) sum04 from WC1 a join metdetail mtd on mtd.mid=a.mid join meeting mt on mt.id=mtd.metid where 1=1 AND year(mt.date)=@YEARC AND mt.mclass=3 group by mtd.mid ) a where md.mid=a.mid),0) sum04 /* 會議參與 */ ,isnull((select sum05 from ( select a.mid,count(1) sum05 from WC1 a join memshare b on a.mid=b.mid where 1=1 AND b.checked=2 AND year(b.date)=@YEARC group by a.mid ) a where md.mid=a.mid),0) sum05 /* 教材分享-1 */ ,isnull((select sum06 from ( select ms.mid,count(1) sum06 from WC1 a join memshare ms on ms.mid=a.mid join fileshare fs on fs.mfid =ms.id where 1=1 AND ms.checked=2 AND year(ms.date)=@YEARC group by ms.mid ) a where md.mid=a.mid),0) sum06 /* 教材分享-2 */ from WC1 md order by md.realname

declare @YEARC INT=#year#; WITH WC1 AS ( select md.mid ,md.realname ,md.regyear ,md.active from memdetail md where md.active = 1 ) select md.mid, md.realname, md.regyear ,isnull((select sum11 from ( select a.mid,sum(hours) sum11 from WC1 a join memsrcs b on a.mid=b.mid where b.ckeckd=2 AND year(sdate)=@YEARC and tuclass between 1 and 5 group by a.mid )a where 1=1 and a.mid=md.mid),0) sum11 /* 授課推廣1 */ ,isnull((select sum12 from ( select mtd.mid,sum(mtd.score) sum12 from WC1 a join metdetail mtd on mtd.mid=a.mid join meeting mt on mt.id=mtd.metid where 1=1 and year(mt.date)=@YEARC AND (mt.mclass=1 OR mt.mclass=2) AND mtd.mcont=2 group by mtd.mid ) a where a.mid=md.mid),0) sum12 /* 社群分享 */ ,isnull((select sum13 from ( select mtd.mid,sum(mtd.score) sum13 from WC1 a join metdetail mtd on mtd.mid=a.mid join meeting mt on mt.id=mtd.metid where 1=1 and year(mt.date)=@YEARC AND mt.mclass=3 AND mtd.mcont=2 group by mtd.mid ) a where a.mid=md.mid),0) sum13 /* 發展署講師 */ ,isnull((select sum02 from ( select mtd.mid,sum(mtd.score) sum02 from WC1 a join metdetail mtd on mtd.mid=a.mid join meeting mt on mt.id=mtd.metid where 1=1 and year(mt.date)=@YEARC AND (mt.mclass=1 OR mt.mclass=2) AND mtd.mcont=1 group by mtd.mid ) a where a.mid=md.mid),0) sum02 /* 社群互動 */ ,isnull(( select cnt03 from ( select ms.mid,count(1) cnt03 from WC1 a JOIN memshare ms ON ms.mid=a.mid where ms.checked=2 AND year(ms.date)=@YEARC group by ms.mid ) a where a.mid=md.mid),0) sum03 /* 教材分享 */ ,isnull((select cnt from ( select a.mid,count(1) cnt from WC1 a join memshare b on a.mid=b.mid join fileshare c on b.id=c.mfid where a.active=1 and b.checked=2 and year(b.date)=@YEARC group by a.mid ) a where 1=1 and a.mid=md.mid),0) sum04 /* 教材下載 */ from WC1 md order by md.realname

select * from teasurvey where 1=1
and id = #id#
and confirm = #confirm#
order by aodate desc

select a.* ,b.realname, b.pid from Member a join Memdetail b on a.id=b.mid where 1=1
and a.id = #id#
and a.role = #role#
and (b.email = #email# or a.email = #email# or a.username = #email#)
and b.pid = #pid#
and b.realname like '%' + #realname# + '%'
order by b.realname

select distinct mt.[id] ,mt.[date] ,mt.[metname] ,mt.[metloc] ,mt.[mclass] ,mt.[starttime] ,mt.[endtime] ,(select mm.realname + ',' from metdetail md join memdetail mm on md.mid=mm.mid where md.metid=a.metid and mcont=2 order by mm.realname for xml path ('') ) as [shares] ,(select mm.realname + ',' from metdetail md join memdetail mm on md.mid=mm.mid where md.metid=a.metid and mcont=1 order by mm.realname for xml path ('') ) as [metdtl] from meeting mt join metdetail a on mt.id=a.metid where 1=1
and year(mt.date)=#year#
and mt.mclass=#mclass#
order by mt.[date]
select a.*, b.realname from opinion a join memdetail b on a.mid=b.mid where answer = 2 order by date desc

/*帳號、姓名、紀錄時間、IP、使用瀏覽器、訊息*/ select distinct a.id ,a.username,a.logtype,a.createtime,a.ip,a.message,a.useragent,c.realname from loginlog a join member b on a.username=b.email join memdetail c on b.id=c.mid LEFT JOIN CDHOLIDAY CH ON CONVERT(date,CH.HOLDATE)=CONVERT(date,a.createtime) WHERE ((FORMAT(a.createtime,'HH:mm:ss')>='00:00:00' AND FORMAT(a.createtime,'HH:mm:ss')<='06:00:00') OR CH.REASON IS NOT NULL) AND YEAR(a.createtime)=#ExpYear1# AND MONTH(a.createtime)=#ExpMonth1# ORDER BY a.createtime DESC

select md.mid,md.realname,md.regyear,md.phone ,md.mobile,md.email,md.jemail ,isnull((select sum11a from (select mid,sum(hours) sum11a from memsrcs where 1=1 AND tuclass between 1 and 5 AND ckeckd=2 AND year(sdate)=#year# and isnull(govplan,'')='' group by mid ) a where md.mid=a.mid),0) sum11a /*授課推廣(非政府補助)*/ ,isnull((select sum11b from (select mid,sum(hours) sum11b from memsrcs where 1=1 AND tuclass between 1 and 5 AND ckeckd=2 AND year(sdate)=#year# and isnull(govplan,'')!='' group by mid ) a where md.mid=a.mid),0) sum11b /*授課推廣(政府補助)*/ ,isnull((select sum12 from (select mtd.mid,sum(mtd.score) sum12 from meeting mt join metdetail mtd on mt.id=mtd.metid where 1=1 AND year(mt.date)=#year# AND (mt.mclass=1 OR mt.mclass=2) AND mtd.mcont=2 group by mtd.mid ) a where md.mid=a.mid),0) sum12 /*社群分享*/ ,isnull((select sum13 from (select mtd.mid,sum(mtd.score) sum13 from meeting mt join metdetail mtd on mt.id=mtd.metid where 1=1 AND year(mt.date)=#year# AND mt.mclass=3 AND mtd.mcont=2 group by mtd.mid ) a where md.mid=a.mid),0) sum13 /*發展署講師*/ ,isnull((select sum02 from (select mtd.mid,sum(mtd.score) sum02 from meeting mt join metdetail mtd on mt.id=mtd.metid where 1=1 AND year(mt.date)=#year# AND (mt.mclass=1 OR mt.mclass=2) AND mtd.mcont=1 group by mtd.mid ) a where md.mid=a.mid),0) sum02 /*社群互動*/ ,isnull((select sum03 from (select mid,count(1) sum03 from memshare where 1=1 AND checked=2 AND year(date)=#year# group by mid ) a where md.mid=a.mid),0) sum03 /*教材分享*/ ,isnull((select sum041 from (select ms.mid,count(1) sum041 from fileshare fs join memshare ms on ms.id=fs.mfid where 1=1 AND ms.checked=2 AND year(ms.date)=#year# group by ms.mid ) a where md.mid=a.mid),0) sum04 from memdetail md where md.active=1 order by md.realname

select a.mid, a.realname, a.phone, a.mobile, a.email, a.jemail, a.regyear ,isnull(sum(case when b.ckeckd=1 and year(b.sdate)=#year# then 1 else 0 end),0) sum1 ,isnull(sum(case when b.ckeckd=2 and year(b.sdate)=#year# then 1 else 0 end),0) sum2 ,isnull(sum(case when b.ckeckd=3 and year(b.sdate)=#year# then 1 else 0 end),0) sum3 ,isnull(sum(case when b.ckeckd=3 and year(b.sdate)=#year# then 1 else 0 end),0) sum4 from memdetail a left join memsrcs b on a.mid=b.mid where a.active=1 group by a.mid, a.realname, a.phone, a.mobile, a.email, a.jemail, a.regyear order by a.realname
select a.realname, a.phone, a.mobile, a.email, a.jemail, a.teachunit , b.* from memdetail a left join memsrcs b on a.mid=b.mid where a.active=1 and year(b.sdate)=#year# order by a.realname

select a.mid,a.realname, a.phone, a.mobile, a.email, a.jemail, a.regyear ,isnull(sum(case when b.checked=1 and year(b.date)=#year# then 1 else 0 end),0) sum1 ,isnull(sum(case when b.checked=2 and year(b.date)=#year# then 1 else 0 end),0) sum2 ,isnull(sum(case when b.checked=3 and year(b.date)=#year# then 1 else 0 end),0) sum3 ,isnull(sum(case when b.checked=4 and year(b.date)=#year# then 1 else 0 end),0) sum4 from memdetail a left join memshare b on a.mid=b.mid where a.active=1 group by a.mid,a.realname, a.phone, a.mobile, a.email, a.jemail, a.regyear order by a.realname
select a.realname, a.phone, a.mobile, a.email, a.jemail, a.teachunit , b.* from memdetail a left join memshare b on a.mid=b.mid where a.active=1 and year(b.date)=#year# order by a.realname

select * from ( select a.mid, a.realname, min(b.date) as [date] from memdetail a left join memshare b on a.mid=b.mid where a.active=1 and year(b.date)=#AuditYear# and checked=1 group by a.mid, a.realname ) x order by [date]
select realname as Text, mid as Code from memdetail where realname like '%' + #keyword# + '%' and active = 1
